positive: A whimsical and aesthetically pleasing scene featuring a group of stylized forest creatures—a friendly fox, an elegant owl, and a mischievous raccoon—interacting in a brightly lit, enchanted grove. The artwork should utilize strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast, giving it a slightly vintage storybook illustration feel. Focus on bold, graphic shapes and linework. The color palette should be rich jewel tones (deep emerald, sapphire blue, ruby red) mixed with muted, earthy tones (sage green, burnt sienna). The composition must be central and circular, perfect for a repeating apparel print or a single focal graphic. Use dot screen or halftoning texture subtly visible in the background for depth. Vector art quality, crisp edges, cinematic lighting, highly detailed, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, noise, text, logo, watermark, signature, multiple characters, deformed, ugly, bad anatomy, low resolution, grayscale, monochrome, messy, photorealism
